---
title: "Drift Report"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
params:
  drift: NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(kableExtra)
drift <- params$drift
```

## `r drift$dataset_name`

| | Previous | Current |
|---|---|---|
| **Snapshot** | #`r drift$snap_prev$id` | #`r drift$snap_curr$id` |
| **Timestamp** | `r drift$snap_prev$run_timestamp` | `r drift$snap_curr$run_timestamp` |
| **File** | `r drift$snap_prev$file_name` | `r drift$snap_curr$file_name` |

---

## Table-Level Drift

```{r table-drift}
td <- drift$table_drift
td$Exceeds <- ifelse(
  td$Exceeds == "***",
  cell_spec("EXCEEDS", color = "red", bold = TRUE),
  ""
)
kbl(td, escape = FALSE) |>
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
```

---

## Schema Drift

```{r schema-drift}
sc <- drift$schema_changes
if (nrow(sc) == 0) {
  cat("No schema changes detected.")
} else {
  sc$Status <- cell_spec(
    sc$Status,
    color = ifelse(sc$Status == "TYPE CHANGED", "orange",
            ifelse(sc$Status == "NEW COLUMN",   "blue", "red")),
    bold = TRUE
  )
  kbl(sc, escape = FALSE) |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE)
}
```

---

## Per-Column Drift

### Missing Rate Changes

```{r missing-rate}
mr <- drift$missing_rate_changes
if (nrow(mr) > 0) {
  out <- data.frame(
    Column    = mr$Column,
    Previous  = sprintf("%.1f%%", mr$missing_rate_prev * 100),
    Current   = sprintf("%.1f%%", mr$missing_rate_curr * 100),
    Change_pp = sprintf("%+.2f", mr$missing_rate_change_pp),
    Exceeds   = ifelse(mr$missing_rate_exceeds,
                       cell_spec("YES", color = "red", bold = TRUE), ""),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE
  )
  kbl(out, escape = FALSE) |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                  full_width = FALSE)
} else {
  cat("No missing rate changes.")
}
```

### Non-Numeric Rate Changes

```{r non-numeric-rate}
nn <- drift$non_numeric_changes
if (nrow(nn) > 0) {
  out <- data.frame(
    Column    = nn$Column,
    Previous  = sprintf("%.2f%%", nn$non_numeric_rate_prev * 100),
    Current   = sprintf("%.2f%%", nn$non_numeric_rate_curr * 100),
    Change_pp = sprintf("%+.2f", nn$non_numeric_rate_change_pp),
    Exceeds   = ifelse(nn$non_numeric_rate_exceeds,
                       cell_spec("YES", color = "red", bold = TRUE), ""),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE
  )
  kbl(out, escape = FALSE) |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                  full_width = FALSE)
} else {
  cat("No non-numeric rate changes.")
}
```

### Numeric Mean Shifts

```{r numeric-mean}
ms <- drift$mean_shifts
if (nrow(ms) > 0) {
  out <- data.frame(
    Column    = ms$Column,
    Previous  = sprintf("%.4g", ms$numeric_mean_prev),
    Current   = sprintf("%.4g", ms$numeric_mean_curr),
    Shift_pct = sprintf("%+.1f%%", ms$numeric_mean_shift_pct * 100),
    Exceeds   = ifelse(ms$numeric_mean_exceeds,
                       cell_spec("YES", color = "red", bold = TRUE), ""),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE
  )
  kbl(out, escape = FALSE) |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                  full_width = FALSE)
} else {
  cat("No numeric columns to compare.")
}
```

### Distinct Count Changes

```{r distinct-count}
dc <- drift$distinct_changes
if (nrow(dc) > 0) {
  out <- data.frame(
    Column     = dc$Column,
    Previous   = dc$distinct_count_prev,
    Current    = dc$distinct_count_curr,
    Change     = sprintf("%+d", dc$distinct_count_change),
    Change_pct = ifelse(!is.na(dc$distinct_count_change_pct),
                        sprintf("%+.1f%%", dc$distinct_count_change_pct * 100),
                        ""),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  kbl(out, escape = FALSE) |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                  full_width = FALSE)
} else {
  cat("No distinct count changes.")
}
```
